description: Capture each completed Codex turn into the private local knowledge inbox. This hook never edits or publishes the website.

hooks.command: node --input-type=module --eval "import{spawnSync as s}from'node:child_process';import{lstatSync as l,realpathSync as x}from'node:fs';import{dirname as n,isAbsolute as a,join as j,relative as v}from'node:path';import{pathToFileURL as u}from'node:url';try{let c=process.cwd(),A=[],S=new Set;for(;;){let g=s('git',['-C',c,'rev-parse','--show-toplevel'],{encoding:'utf8',shell:false,windowsHide:true});if(g.status!==0||!g.stdout.trim())break;let R=x(g.stdout.trim());if(S.has(R))break;S.add(R);A.push(R);c=n(R)}let P=q=>{let d=[q,j(q,'.codex'),j(q,'.agents'),j(q,'.agents','skills'),j(q,'.agents','skills','curate-portable-knowledge-base'),j(q,'.agents','skills','curate-portable-knowledge-base','scripts')],f=[j(q,'.codex','hooks.json'),j(q,'kb.config.json'),...['hook-bootstrap.mjs','capture-turn.mjs','private-runtime.mjs','kb-tool.mjs'].map(k=>j(d.at(-1),k))];try{let R=x(q);for(let p of d){let z=l(p),w=v(R,x(p));if(z.isSymbolicLink()||!z.isDirectory()||w.startsWith('..')||a(w))throw 0}for(let p of f){let z=l(p),w=v(R,x(p));if(z.isSymbolicLink()||!z.isFile()||w.startsWith('..')||a(w))throw 0}return f}catch{return null}},q=null,f=null;for(let p of A){let z=P(p);if(z){q=p;f=z}}if(!A.length){q=process.cwd();f=P(q)}let b=false;if(A.length&&q)for(let p=n(q);;p=n(p)){if(P(p)){b=true;break}if(n(p)===p)break}if(!f||b)throw 0;await import(u(f[2]).href)}catch{process.stdout.write('{\"continue\":true}\n')}"
hooks.commandWindows: node --input-type=module --eval "import{spawnSync as s}from'node:child_process';import{lstatSync as l,realpathSync as x}from'node:fs';import{dirname as n,isAbsolute as a,join as j,relative as v}from'node:path';import{pathToFileURL as u}from'node:url';try{let c=process.cwd(),A=[],S=new Set;for(;;){let g=s('git',['-C',c,'rev-parse','--show-toplevel'],{encoding:'utf8',shell:false,windowsHide:true});if(g.status!==0||!g.stdout.trim())break;let R=x(g.stdout.trim());if(S.has(R))break;S.add(R);A.push(R);c=n(R)}let P=q=>{let d=[q,j(q,'.codex'),j(q,'.agents'),j(q,'.agents','skills'),j(q,'.agents','skills','curate-portable-knowledge-base'),j(q,'.agents','skills','curate-portable-knowledge-base','scripts')],f=[j(q,'.codex','hooks.json'),j(q,'kb.config.json'),...['hook-bootstrap.mjs','capture-turn.mjs','private-runtime.mjs','kb-tool.mjs'].map(k=>j(d.at(-1),k))];try{let R=x(q);for(let p of d){let z=l(p),w=v(R,x(p));if(z.isSymbolicLink()||!z.isDirectory()||w.startsWith('..')||a(w))throw 0}for(let p of f){let z=l(p),w=v(R,x(p));if(z.isSymbolicLink()||!z.isFile()||w.startsWith('..')||a(w))throw 0}return f}catch{return null}},q=null,f=null;for(let p of A){let z=P(p);if(z){q=p;f=z}}if(!A.length){q=process.cwd();f=P(q)}let b=false;if(A.length&&q)for(let p=n(q);;p=n(p)){if(P(p)){b=true;break}if(n(p)===p)break}if(!f||b)throw 0;await import(u(f[2]).href)}catch{process.stdout.write('{\"continue\":true}\n')}"
hooks.statusMessage: Queuing this prompt in the private knowledge inbox
